title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 36
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about jobs at home.
questions.audio_script: Man: What job do you have to do at home on Sunday? I thought you were going to cut the grass. || Woman: No, the machine is broken. || Man: Then are you going to wash the dishes? || Woman: Not today, because there are not many yet. Mum said [1]my job is to take rubbish bags out[/1]. || Man: That should not take too long. || Woman: I hope not. I want to finish before my friend comes round, so we can go out together. || Woman: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What job do you have to do at home on Sunday? I thought you were going to cut the grass.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: No, the machine is broken.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Then are you going to wash the dishes?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Not today, because there are not many yet. Mum said my job is to take rubbish bags out.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That should not take too long.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I hope not. I want to finish before my friend comes round, so we can go out together.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.explanation: The speaker says their job is to take rubbish bags out.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans after school.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are we still going to the concert after school? I brought everything for it. || Man: I don't think so. The singer is ill, so it will not work today. || Woman: We could try the café instead. || Man: I thought about that, but it is full of people. My cousin sent me a message, and [1]we are going to a comedy show this afternoon instead[/1]. || Woman: Fine. Shall we meet by the bus stop at four? || Man: Yes, and bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it.

dialogue.text: Are we still going to the concert after school? I brought everything for it.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I don't think so. The singer is ill, so it will not work today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: We could try the café instead.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I thought about that, but it is full of people. My cousin sent me a message, and we are going to a comedy show this afternoon instead.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Fine. Shall we meet by the bus stop at four?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, and bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it.

questions.context: You hear an announcement about the language club.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: Please listen carefully if you are joining the language club today. It will not be in its usual place. Some students may go to the room three, but the teacher has a meeting there. Others may wait near the computer room, although the internet is down. [1]Everyone should go straight to the library after lunch[/1]. Please tell any friends who arrive late, because the activity will start as soon as the teacher is ready. You do not need to bring anything extra.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Please listen carefully if you are joining the language club today. It will not be in its usual place. Some students may go to the room three, but the teacher has a meeting there. Others may wait near the computer room, although the internet is down. Everyone should go straight to the library after lunch. Please tell any friends who arrive late, because the activity will start as soon as the teacher is ready. You do not need to bring anything extra.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about something broken in a living room.
questions.audio_script: Boy: Something is broken in the living room, but I am not sure what. Is it the television? || Girl: No, the picture is fine. || Boy: Maybe it is the curtain rail. || Girl: I checked that too, and it was fixed yesterday. [1]The problem is the remote control, because none of the buttons work[/1]. || Boy: We should tell someone before it gets worse. || Girl: I already wrote a note, and I will show it to Dad when he gets home. || Girl: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two friends talking about a visit to a museum day.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What did you do at the museum day last weekend? I thought you wanted to try painting. || Man: I did, but there were no brushes left. || Woman: Did you do treasure hunt instead? || Man: No, because it was already finished. In the end, [1]I spent most of the afternoon doing making clay pots[/1]. It was better than I expected. || Woman: I might come next time. || Man: You should. The helpers were friendly, and everything was easy to understand. || Man: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on a outdoor theatre show.
questions.audio_script: Man: Are you ready for the outdoor theatre show tomorrow? I was going to pack a gloves, because that seemed useful. || Woman: I read the message from school again. You do not need that. || Man: What about a folding chair? || Woman: Not really. [1]The teacher says everyone should bring a rain hat because everyone must sit on the grass for two hours[/1]. || Man: Thanks. I will put it in my bag now, before I forget. || Woman: Good plan. We have to leave early in the morning.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the shopping centre.
questions.audio_script: Man: How are you getting to the shopping centre tomorrow? I thought you were going to take the train. || Woman: I was, but the train is delayed. || Man: Could you use walking instead? || Woman: I checked, but it may rain before lunch. [1]I am going to take the bus because it leaves from outside school[/1]. || Man: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive. || Woman: Great. I will send a message if I am late. || Woman: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.
